channel.title: GitHub Issues on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub Issues on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Detecting Duplicate Issues – Public Preview and issue fields MCP support for GitHub Issues
item.description:
GitHub Issues adds duplicate issue detection in public preview and expands MCP support for issue fields. The change is aimed at reducing duplicate triage work for maintainers, especially in large repositories.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Link code scanning alerts to GitHub Issues
item.description:
GitHub added the ability to link code scanning alerts to GitHub Issues. The feature is in public preview and is meant to connect security remediation work with existing planning and tracking workflows.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Create issues from Slack with Copilot
item.description:
GitHub now lets you create Issues from Slack using the GitHub app and natural-language prompts. Mention @GitHub in a Slack channel, describe the work, and it will create the issue in GitHub.

  • Source: GitHub
